description.content: Operations for managing wiki page content

item.name: Azure DevOps Get a wiki page

request.name: Azure DevOps Get a wiki page

description.content: Returns the content and metadata for a wiki page at a given path. The path parameter is required to specify which page to retrieve. Returns the Markdown content of the page and optional metadata such as git commit information.

query.description: (Required) Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.
Version descriptor (branch or tag) to read the page from
Whether to include the page content in the response

variable.description: (Required) Wiki GUID or wiki name
Azure DevOps organization name or ID
Azure DevOps project name or ID

response.name: Wiki page returned successfully

item.name: Azure DevOps Create or update a wiki page

request.name: Azure DevOps Create or update a wiki page

description.content: Creates a new wiki page or updates an existing page at the specified path. The request body must contain the Markdown content for the page. To update an existing page, include the current page version in the If-Match header to prevent overwriting concurrent changes.

query.description: (Required) Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.
(Required) Path of the wiki page to create or update
Comment for the commit creating this page update
Branch to create or update the page on

variable.description: (Required) Wiki GUID or wiki name
Azure DevOps organization name or ID
Azure DevOps project name or ID

response.name: Wiki page updated successfully

variable.description: (Required) Wiki GUID or wiki name
Azure DevOps organization name or ID
Azure DevOps project name or ID

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

body.raw:
{
  "content": "# Getting Started

Welcome to the project wiki!

## Prerequisites

- Node.js 18+
- npm or yarn
"
}

item.name: Azure DevOps Delete a wiki page

request.name: Azure DevOps Delete a wiki page

description.content: Deletes a wiki page at the specified path. This commits a deletion to the backing Git repository. Deleted pages cannot be recovered except through the backing repository's Git history.

query.description: (Required) Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.
(Required) Path of the wiki page to delete
Branch to delete the page from

variable.description: (Required) Wiki GUID or wiki name
Azure DevOps organization name or ID
Azure DevOps project name or ID

response.name: Wiki page deleted successfully, returns the deleted page

Deletes a wiki. For a project wiki, this deletes the wiki and the backing Git repository. For a code wiki, this removes the wiki but leaves the backing repository intact. This operation cannot be undone.

REST API for creating and managing wikis and wiki pages in Azure DevOps projects. Every project wiki is backed by a Git repository, enabling version-controlled documentation. Supports creating, reading, updating, and deleting wikis and pages programmatically with Markdown content.

 Name: Microsoft Azure DevOps
